description: This scenario tracks public support for the 2024 South African Constitutional Eighteenth Amendment Bill, aimed at facilitating the expropriation of land without compensation. The reform faced intense political friction between the ANC and opposition parties like the DA.

key_events.description: ANC announces formal support for land expropriation amendment.
Opposition parties launch nationwide campaign highlighting property rights risks.
Constitutional Court clarifies legal scope of the amendment.

calibration_notes: Useful for calibrating models on policy-driven polarization in post-colonial contexts.
